'''Bezz Drexx''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He received bribes from [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] [[Passel Argente's uncle|uncle]] who was affiliated with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. However, the senator dealings were exposed by [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and [[Sheltay Retrac/Legends|Sheltay Retrac]] in his mansion on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CWA 7" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bezz Drexx's [[Species/Legends|species]] is not revealed in ''Spy Girls''.
